bird.name: Caribbean elaenia
bird.summary: The Caribbean elaenia (Elaenia martinica) is a species of bird in subfamily Elaeniinae of family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is…

locations.name: 常綠森林
locations.summary: 常綠森林是由常綠樹木組成的森林。它們出現在廣泛的氣候帶中，包括寒冷氣候中的針葉樹和冬青樹等樹木，溫帶地區的桉樹、活橡樹、金合歡和班克樹，以及熱帶地區的雨林樹木。針葉溫帶常綠森林最常以科中的物種為主。樹木包括：松科和柏科。闊葉溫帶常綠森林包…

locations.name: 小安的列斯群岛
locations.summary: 小安的列斯群岛（英語：Lesser Antilles，西班牙語：Antillas Menores），又称加勒比群岛，是位于加勒比海西印度群岛中安的列斯群岛东部和南部的岛群。群岛呈圆弧状，从波多黎各以东开始，向南穿过背风群岛和向风群岛，几乎…

relations.subject: Caribbean elaenia
relations.evidence: It is found in the canopy and on the edges of humid evergreen forest, in deciduous woodland, scrublands, parks and gardens, open land with a scattering of trees and shrubs, and coastally in mangroves

relations.subject: Caribbean elaenia
relations.evidence: It also occurs in the mountains of the southern Lesser Antilles
